name: Senior Investor — OAS Clawback, Multi-Slips, and Return of Capital Trap
description: Complete Margaret Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Her tax documents and scenario details are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'margaret_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4037 (Capital Gains) 2024; CRA Guide T4055; Real multi-slip portfolio structures
metadata.key_complexity: OAS clawback triggered by T4RIF and investment income; multiple T5008s; T3 Box 42 (Return of Capital) trap; T4A(OAS) and T4A(P)
